files.notes: This file contains one main article about Hamlin Garland followed by multiple Guide Lessons sections covering different topics (Practical Religion, Literature with James Matthew Barrie biography and play analysis, and Social Service with child study). The final section also includes additional content like book reviews and advertisements that appear to be end matter.
